Neobartsia stricta is native to South America and is known to be a hemiparasitic plant, meaning it obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing other plants. The plant is further classified into the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and its position within the plant kingdom.
